text.title: Demo Recap Email Template Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules with rationale + source for demo-recap-email-template. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Every recap email MUST carry six blocks in this order: header (sprint + date + attendees), demoed features (linked to tickets), decisions made (with named decider), scope deltas (added / removed / parked), open items (with named owner + due date), next demo date + scope.
rule.rationale: PMBOK 7 stakeholder communications — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.

rule.statement: Every decision MUST name the human who made it; ambiguous attribution ('the team agreed') is forbidden — use HiPPO-override discipline from facilitation-anti-patterns.
rule.rationale: BABOK v3 stakeholder analysis — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.

rule.statement: Each scope delta MUST cite the ticket id (or new ticket created) where the change is captured; prose-only scope deltas are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Change control discipline (PMBOK) — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.

rule.statement: Each open item MUST have a single named owner and an ISO date; a bare to-be-decided placeholder is rejected — escalate to sponsor instead.
rule.rationale: Single-owner accountability principle — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.

rule.statement: Recap email MUST be sent within 24 hours of demo end; later than that the client memory drift dominates and the email loses authority.
rule.rationale: Communication-recency research — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.

rule.statement: Email asks client for ack or objection within 48 hours of send; silence beyond that window is recorded as 'tacit acceptance' in the engagement log.
rule.rationale: Outsource governance practice — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.

rule.statement: If the engagement has no recurring demo cadence or the client refuses written records, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to Demo Recap Email Template.
